steps.title: Bootstrap seller session and category references
steps.summary: Seller session and category references are ready.

steps.title: Open Seller Product create page
steps.summary: Seller product create page loaded with the new category selector.

steps.title: Search category using the new search box
steps.summary: Search narrowed the selector to the expected category entry.

steps.title: Select multiple categories and set one as default
steps.summary: Multiple categories were selected and one default category was set.

steps.title: Save draft and capture create payload
steps.summary: Draft saved with the expected selected categories and default category.
